calendar.description: Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses family law proceedings.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>addresses factors for a court to consider when deciding whether to award costs, attorney fees, and witness fees in a family law proceeding;<hr><ltbullet>provides a process for ordering mental health treatment in a child custody proceeding;<hr><ltbullet>provides that a court may consider evidence of coercive control when making a child custody or parent-time decision;<hr><ltbullet>creates a new part addressing a child custody evaluation; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
